definition: Grimoire gaps variable bytes in binary format inputs (font/shaping data) and splices recognizable format-specific token sequences (OpenType table tags, cmap/GDEF/GPOS fragments, script-selector codepoints, repetitive category-byte blocks) into structurally coherent inputs that drive deep shaper-pipeline paths (script detection, Indic syllable classification, Thai consonant lookup, cluster-merge traversal); cmplog's byte-local I2S cannot synthesize the required structural skeleton.

authoring_contract.goal: ONE parameterized template.c isolating this cluster's shared mechanism, with exactly ONE compile-time -D knob = the program-feature axis. params.json:parameter MUST name that macro; scan_values sweep it; fuzzers = involved_fuzzers; expected_direction = '<winner> > <loser>'.
authoring_contract.isolate: No partial-match coverage edges unless the mechanism IS a gradient (VP families). Keep the gate the only objective.

members.source_line: for (unsigned k = j; k && info[k - 1].cluster == old_cluster; k--)

signature.mechanism_summary: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage gaps variable bytes so structural mutators can splice recognizable table/script tokens (typ1, feats, sn-hans, vdsc) into inputs deep enough to repeatedly enter and exit the cluster-merge loop; path depth, not a single constant, is the bottleneck.
signature.one_line: Structural token splicing builds inputs deep enough to traverse cluster-merge loop

analysis.summary_one_line: Reach a backward cluster-merge where the loop guard fails immediately (k=0 or first prior cluster differs), i.e. the false-exit of the cluster-backfill scan.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A structurally well-formed multi-table font input that repeatedly invokes delete_glyphs_inplace's backward-merge path and reaches the line-633 loop's false exit. Grimoire's generalized token/gap splicing assembles the table-tag and feature structure (e.g. 'typ1', 'feats', 'sn-hans', 'vdsc') that keeps the shaper running long enough to hit the merge loop and exit it.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: grimoire resolves 9/10 (blocked 1, 6.10h) and its seeds (a732bc59..., d1a42223...) carry recognizable table/script tokens ('typ1', 'feats', 'sn-hans', 'vdsc', 'darfhdscpglh') produced by structural splicing of generalized corpus fragments, building inputs that traverse the cluster-merge code.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog resolves only 2/10 and stays blocked 18.10h; lacking the GeneralizationStage and Grimoire structural mutators it cannot recombine these token/gap structures, so its byte-level I2S substitution does not assemble the deep, valid table structure needed to repeatedly enter the merge loop.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winning technique is grimoire structural mutation: GeneralizationStage plus the Grimoire splice/recurse mutators build grammar-free structural variants that exercise the cluster-merge path more reliably than cmplog's I2S-only stack. Mechanism is grimoire structural.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the false-exit side of a backward cluster-merge loop at hb-buffer.cc:633.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: for (unsigned k = j; k && info[k - 1].cluster == old_cluster; k--)

evidence_trail.claim: The globally blocked side is the false branch.
naive resolves the branch 10/10 while cmplog blocks it 8/10 in the I2S pair.
cmplog is the loser of the I2S pair, blocked for 18.10h with hitcount 1.
Winner naive drives merge_clusters far more than loser cmplog (42 vs 6 invocations).
A naive winner seed is large (101 bytes) and built by havoc/token mutators with repeated byte runs.
cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which substitutes CMP operands at matching offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: grimoire resolves 9/10 while cmplog blocks 8/10 in the grimoire_structural pair.
A grimoire winner seed carries structural table/script tokens produced by structural splicing.
Grimoire adds a GeneralizationStage plus structural mutators that splice generalized token/gap structures.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
splice and recurse on these generalised token/gap structures
(string-based, grammar-free structural mutation)

evidence_trail.claim: The single-technique delta separating grimoire from cmplog is generalization plus Grimoire mutators, both already having I2S.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: grimoire adds generalization + Grimoire mutators), not vs naive

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with an explicit integer/string comparison gate guarding entry to the cluster-merge loop on which cmplog (I2S) then resolves at least as fast as naive — showing the branch is in fact a CMP roadblock that I2S solves rather than a data-volume loop exit where I2S is overhead.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The claim that naive's larger buffers (vs cmplog) are what drives the line-633 false-exit is inferred from merge_clusters hit counts (42 vs 6) and seed sizes, not from a direct trace of the loop guard's first-iteration outcome.

signature.mechanism_summary: Grimoire's splice/recurse mutators duplicate a short dword token (f2 a8 00 00) into a repetitive category-byte block that drives the Indic state machine to case 19; scalar I2S mutation alone cannot assemble this structurally regular repetition.
signature.one_line: Structural splice duplicates dword token into repetitive block reaching case 19

analysis.summary_one_line: A glyph-category byte sequence that drives the Indic state machine into trans-action 19 (indic_symbol_cluster), reachable by raw havoc or structural splicing but not by I2S-anchored cmplog mutation.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same case-19 driving category run, assembled by recombining generalized token/gap structures rather than discovered by raw byte search. The grimoire winner seeds repeat a small dword token (f2 a8 00 00) and splice it (id=68d1ae222de2c678: f2 a8 00 00 f2 a8 00 00 ...), i.e. a structurally regular category block.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: grimoire resolves 8/10 (winner) while cmplog resolves 1/10 (loser); winner seeds id=ce09bb2d97eac25b and id=68d1ae222de2c678 are grimoire-discovered, short (14 bytes) and built from a repeated f2 a8 00 00 dword token consistent with GeneralizationStage + Grimoire structural splice/recurse rather than scalar mutation.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog has the cmplog stack but lacks the GeneralizationStage and the Grimoire structural mutators that grimoire adds; without generalized-token splicing it cannot cheaply build the regular category block that drives state 19, so it stays blocked (loser resolved=1/10 blocked=9).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: grimoire's GeneralizationStage replaces concrete byte runs with <GAP> placeholders and its Grimoire mutators splice/recurse those generalized token structures; this string-based structural recombination assembles the repetitive category-byte block that drives trans-action 19, which the cmplog loser (no generalization, no Grimoire mutators) cannot synthesize.

evidence_trail.claim: The decisive pair naive>cmplog is attributed to the I2S technique delta and naive is the winner.
naive resolves all 10 trials with high branch hitcount while cmplog stays blocked.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
winner: resolved=10/10  blocked=0  unreached=0
  loser:  resolved=1/10  blocked=9  unreached=0
  avg duration blocked: winner=0.80h  loser=22.50h
  avg hitcount on branch: winner=87  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is case 19 in the Indic syllable Ragel state machine, calling found_syllable(indic_symbol_cluster).
The case-19 action fires found_syllable(indic_symbol_cluster).
The transition is selected by an array-index range comparison on info[p].indic_category(), not a logged scalar/string CMP.
naive uses havoc + token mutators with no I2S.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of naive's mutator stack.
Naive winner seeds were discovered by arithmetic/insert havoc mutators perturbing the category bytes.
Another naive winner seed was discovered via expand/qword-add havoc mutation.
The grimoire>cmplog pair is attributed to the grimoire_structural technique delta with grimoire as winner.
grimoire resolves 8/10 while cmplog resolves 1/10 at this branch.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
winner: resolved=8/10  blocked=2  unreached=0
  loser:  resolved=1/10  blocked=9  unreached=0

evidence_trail.claim: A grimoire winner seed is a short repeated f2 a8 00 00 dword token spliced together.
grimoire adds a GeneralizationStage plus Grimoire structural mutators on top of the cmplog stack.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
it includes the `CmpLogObserver`, the `TracingStage`, and the
`I2SRandReplace` (i2s) stage — and ADDS a `GeneralizationStage` plus
Grimoire structural mutators.

evidence_trail.claim: Grimoire mutators splice and recurse on generalized token/gap structures (string-based structural mutation).
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
splice and recurse on these generalised token/gap structures
(string-based, grammar-free structural mutation)

evidence_trail.claim: The single technique difference for grimoire is vs cmplog (both have I2S), confirming the delta is generalization+Grimoire mutators not I2S.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
The single-technique delta is therefore
`grimoire` vs `cmplog` (both have I2S; grimoire adds generalization +

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with a logged scalar/string CMP gating the case-19 action (instead of the array-index range test on indic_category()) on which cmplog resolves >= naive — showing the gate IS an I2S-substitutable comparison and the divergence is not havoc-vs-I2S-interference.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The claim that I2S is actively anti-helpful (energy diverted) rather than merely neutral rests on the resolved-count gap (naive 10/10 vs cmplog 1/10), not on direct lineage evidence that cmplog spent budget on inapplicable CMP substitutions.

members.function: hb-ot-shaper-indic.cc:initial_reordering_syllable_indic(hb_ot_shape_plan_t const*, hb_face_t*, hb_buffer_t*, unsigned int, unsigned int)

signature.mechanism_summary: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage and structural mutators recombine gap/token sequences (repeated f2 a8 00 00 motifs) into syllable layouts that decode as the indic_symbol_cluster category; cmplog's byte-local mutations cannot construct this structured syllable arrangement.
signature.one_line: Token/gap recombination builds syllable structure decoded as indic_symbol_cluster

analysis.summary_one_line: Input must decode to an Indic symbol-cluster syllable so the syllable_type switch reaches case indic_symbol_cluster.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Same indic_symbol_cluster syllable requirement, reached by splicing/recombining generalized token-and-gap structures from the corpus into a layout that decodes to symbol-cluster text.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: grimoire resolves 8/10 vs cmplog's 1/10; it adds a GeneralizationStage plus Grimoire structural mutators that recombine generalized byte runs, and the grimoire winning seeds show repeated structural motifs (f2 a8 00 00 ... patterns).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog lacks the generalization + structural mutators (it is grimoire's baseline minus those stages) and stays blocked 9/10 at hitcount 0.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: grimoire's added technique over its cmplog baseline is structural mutation: GeneralizationStage replaces concrete runs with gap placeholders and the Grimoire mutators splice/recurse on them, building category-bearing structures that cmplog's byte-local mutators do not assemble.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the case indic_symbol_cluster arm of a switch on an internally-computed syllable_type nibble, not an input-byte comparison.
The globally blocked side is the true branch at case indic_symbol_cluster.
naive wins the I2S pair, resolving 10/10 with hitcount 88 while cmplog blocks 9/10 at hitcount 0.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=88  loser=0

naive has no I2S stage, only havoc + token mutators.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which substitutes operands at offsets matching a logged CMP operand.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.exact_quote: per-execution CMP buffer (`CmpLogObserver`), and CMP_MAP gradient buckets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog resolves 8/10 vs cmplog's 1/10 at this branch, delta attributed to value_profile.
grimoire adds a GeneralizationStage plus structural mutators on top of the cmplog stack.

it includes the `CmpLogObserver`, the `TracingStage`, and the
`I2SRandReplace` (i2s) stage — and ADDS a `GeneralizationStage` plus

evidence_trail.exact_quote:
splice and recurse on these generalised token/gap structures

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose switch dispatches on an input-byte integer compared against a literal (a true I2S CMP), where cmplog then BEATS naive at reaching the symbol arm, would refute the claim that the category dispatch denies cmplog any I2S traction here.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The exact byte-to-Indic-category mapping is not shown; the claim that winning seeds decode to indic_symbol_cluster syllables is inferred from hitcount/blocked counts and seed structure rather than a decoded categorization trace.

signature.mechanism_summary: Grimoire's structural splice embeds the 0x0E0E/0x0E0F codepoint bytes within a valid token/gap scaffold that the Thai shaper fully parses as a glyph buffer; the structural context surrounding the codepoint is what cmplog's I2S substitution alone fails to provide.
signature.one_line: Structural scaffold around Thai codepoint enables shaper to reach consonant-type gate

analysis.summary_one_line: Input must contain a codepoint byte run encoding U+0E0E or U+0E0F (e.g. 0f 0e) at a buffer-glyph offset so get_consonant_type returns DC.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A structurally recombined input that places the 0x0E0E/0x0E0F codepoint run inside a generalized token/gap scaffold the Thai shaper parses as a glyph buffer, so the consonant-type gate's true branch is reached.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: grimoire resolves 9/10 trials; its winning seeds (Seed 2 fuzzer=grimoire, Seed 3 fuzzer=grimoire) are larger structured inputs embedding the 0f 0e codepoint run amid spliced token material (e.g. 6d 61 54 ff 0f 0e and ff 0f 0e 00), consistent with Grimoire's structural splice/recurse over generalized inputs.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog (same baseline plus I2S but WITHOUT the GeneralizationStage and Grimoire structural mutators) blocks 9/10 trials with hitcount 0; it lacks the structural recombination that assembles a buffer reaching the gate.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: grimoire and cmplog share the full cmplog/I2S stack; grimoire's only delta is the GeneralizationStage plus Grimoire structural mutators that splice generalized token/gap structures (grimoire structural), which is what builds the input reaching the branch.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked branch is an exact-equality gate on two Thai codepoints, true side globally blocked.
naive beats cmplog with the I2S technique as the single delta.
value_profile beats value_profile_cmplog with I2S as the single delta.
A non-I2S winner (value_profile) seed carries the literal 0x0E0F codepoint bytes 0f 0e.
A naive winner seed also embeds the 0f 0e codepoint run.
The losers (I2S fuzzers) block the branch with zero hits while non-I2S winners resolve 10/10.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
winner: resolved=10/10  blocked=0  unreached=0
  loser:  resolved=1/10  blocked=9  unreached=0

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace operand-substitution stage on top of naive's havoc/token stack.
naive's mutators are havoc + token only, no I2S.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: grimoire beats cmplog with grimoire_structural as the single delta.
grimoire shares the cmplog/I2S stack and adds only the GeneralizationStage plus Grimoire structural mutators.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: both have I2S; grimoire adds generalization +

evidence_trail.claim: Grimoire structural mutators splice and recurse on generalized token/gap structures.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
splice and recurse on these generalised token/gap structures
(string-based, grammar-free structural mutation)

evidence_trail.claim: A grimoire winner seed embeds the 0f 0e codepoint run inside larger spliced token material.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with an exact-equality codepoint gate where adding the I2SRandReplace stage (cmplog/vpc) resolves the gate at least as often as naive/value_profile — i.e. I2S is NOT a regression — would refute the I2S-anti hypothesis for Pair 1/2.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The mechanism by which adding I2S actively diverts energy and makes cmplog/vpc lose (rather than the win being random havoc variance) is inferred from the seed bytes and trial counts, not directly observed.

signature.mechanism_summary: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage gaps variable font bytes and structural mutators splice whole table fragments (cmap, GDEF, GPOS, OTTO sfnt header) into a coherent multi-table font that shifts script detection to a Unicode-7.0+ tag; I2S byte substitution cannot synthesize the structural skeleton.
signature.one_line: Whole-table fragment splicing builds coherent sfnt that resolves to high-Unicode script

analysis.summary_one_line: Font input whose resolved script tag is a Unicode-7.0+ complex script (GRANTHA et al.) routed to the shared USE-shaper tail.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A structurally valid font whose planner->props.script resolves to one of the Unicode-7.0+ complex scripts in the case block at lines 331-387 (HB_SCRIPT_GRANTHA and siblings), so dispatch enters the case at 331 and falls through to the shared chosen_script test at 394-398. This requires building OpenType tables (cmap/GSUB/GPOS/GDEF) coherent enough that script detection assigns one of these tags rather than landing in the default arm.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Grimoire winning seeds carry well-formed sfnt structure (sfnt version 00 01 00 00 at offset 0, table-directory tags like cmap/GDEF/GPOS, OTTO magic) plus filler/region bytes, exactly the deep structural shape grimoire's GeneralizationStage + structural mutators recombine; the W side reaches the GRANTHA case (line 331 tagged [B]) and runs the downstream USE shaper (W hits 20 vs L hits 6 on zero_mark_width/adjust_mark_offsets).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Cmplog loser seeds are short, byte-scrambled fragments (72-218 bytes, ParentInfo havoc/I2S mutation chains like BytesDeleteMutator/ByteNegMutator) whose script resolution stalls at earlier Unicode-3.0..6.1 case labels (lines 278-330 tagged [L]) or the default arm; they never assemble a font that resolves to a Unicode-7.0+ script, so the blocker true side stays unhit (loser blocked 8/10).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: grimoire adds GeneralizationStage (replaces byte runs with <GAP> placeholders, validated by re-execution) plus the Grimoire structural mutators that splice/recurse on generalized token/gap structures; this grammar-free structural recombination of whole table fragments builds the coherent multi-table font that drives script detection to a new high-Unicode script tag, whereas cmplog's I2S byte substitution (which grimoire also has) only fixes local CMP operands and cannot synthesize the structural skeleton.

evidence_trail.claim: The single decisive pair is grimoire over cmplog with the grimoire_structural delta.
The blocker is the GRANTHA case label, one of a large run of Unicode-7.0+ script case labels.
The GRANTHA case and its siblings fall through to a shared chosen_script test deciding default vs USE shaper.
Winner seeds are well-formed fonts with sfnt structure and table-directory tags (cmap), exercising the true side.
A winner seed carries the OTTO magic and a GPOS table tag, a deep coherent OpenType structure.
Loser seeds are short byte-scrambled fragments produced by cmplog havoc/I2S mutation chains.
The winner runs the downstream shaper far more than the loser, evidence the true-side dispatch was reached.
Grimoire adds a GeneralizationStage plus structural mutators on top of the full cmplog/I2S stack, which is the single-technique delta.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
it includes the `CmpLogObserver`, the `TracingStage`, and the
`I2SRandReplace` (i2s) stage — and ADDS a `GeneralizationStage` plus
Grimoire structural mutators

evidence_trail.claim: Grimoire's structural mutators splice and recurse on generalized token/gap structures (grammar-free structural mutation).
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
splice and recurse on these generalised token/gap structures
(string-based, grammar-free structural mutation)

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on a Unicode-7.0+ script case where cmplog (or naive) reaches the true side at the same rate as grimoire, showing structural recombination is not what supplies the required coherent font skeleton.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The seeds were stored by grimoire/cmplog generically and are not labeled by which decisive trial discovered them, so attributing the W structural coherence specifically to grimoire's GeneralizationStage rests on mechanism reasoning more than direct lineage evidence.
